headline: Ternus THRONES 🍎👑 as Tim Cook CROWN 👑➡️CHAIRMAN DADDY
text:
🍎 BIG APPLE 🍑 SHAKEUP 💥‼️ Tim Cook 👨‍💼⏰ STEPPING DOWN 😤 after 15 YRS SLAYING CEO throne 🪑🔥 to ANOINT John Ternus 🛠️🤖 as NEW BOSS BABY 👶💼 on Sept 1 🗓️🚀! Cook sliding to EXEC CHAIRMAN 👑📈 to sip tea ☕ with policymakers 🌍🤝 while Ternus – 25-YR APPLE VET 🧑‍🔧🍎 – takes the WHEEL 🚗💨! This hardware HUNK 🥩🔩 who's TOUCHED EVERY IPHONE 📱🍆, IPAD 🪟📱, AIRPODS 🎧👂, WATCH ⌚💍 & MAC M1 BRAIN TRANSPLANT 🧠💻 from Intel cucks 🐔🚫 is READY TO INNOVATE 😍🔥!

Cook SPILLS 💦: 'Ternus is VISIONARY 👁️‍🗨️🔮 ENGINEER MIND 🧠⚙️, INNOVATOR SOUL 👻💡 & HEART OF GOLD ❤️👑 – PERFECT to LEAD 🍎 into FUTURE 🚀🌌!' No more OPS GUY VIBES 😴📊 like Tim's IBM/COMPAQ LOGISTICS GRIND 🏭🚚 – Ternus is JOBS 2.0 🪦👨‍💼 but ALIVE AF 🧟‍♂️🔥! Cook turned 🍎 from $1TN 💰🚀 in 2018 to THICC $4TN BEHEMOTH 🐘💎, profits x4 📈🍆 but CRITICS 🗣️😩 ROASTED stagnant lineup 📱😴 – no NEW IPHONE-KILLER 💣📱!

Analysts SIMPING HARD 🤤: Forrester's Dipanjan 📊🧑‍🎤 says 'ESCAPE IPHONE GRAVITY 🪐📱, hunt NEXT GROWTH BANGER 🎸🚀!' Ken Segall (Jobs' CREATIVE DADDY 🎨👑) DRAGS: 'Tim OPS SIMP 🤡📈, Steve VISION GOD 🧔✨!' Gil Luria 🔮 predicts FOLDABLES 📱🔄 & GLASSES 🕶️🤳 PUSH! Apple SLOW AF on AI 🤖😩, slurping Google/OpenAI JUICE 🧃💦 into iOS while NVDA/MSFT/META ORGY 💸🤖 billions – Vision Pro FLOP 🥽💸 didn't BANG 🍆💥!

Sam Altman 🤖💋 X-SIMPS: 'Tim LEGEND 🏆🙌 THX for EVERYTHNG!' Ternus calls Cook MENTOR 🧓👨‍🏫, HYPED: 'OPTIMISM OVERLOAD 😍🚀 for AI HARDWARE DEEP DIVE 🧠🍑!' Prof Hubbard 🏫📚 WONDERS: Can POLISHED 🍎 pivot to WILD EXPERIMENT MODE 🧪😈 or STUCK in SCALE-DEFEND RUT 🛡️📊? New era BECKONS 🍑🔥 – Ternus gonna FOLD our MINDS 📱🧠 & AI-BOMB 💣🤖 like Jobs' garage days 🏠🚀! Wall Street 🍸🤑 ERECTING 📈🍆 waiting for INNOVATION CUMSHOT 💦📱‼️
